content_body: This house is truly a gem within the city limits—a great (huge) southern style house. The neighborhood is in transition, like many areas in ATL, with new houses added all over the street. A short ride to Whole Foods, Starbucks, Midtown, and the new Ponce City Market—you need car to get around. The house is great for Atlanta tourists and business visits.
title: Great Southern Hospitality—Atlanta At Its Best!
